channel.title: The Loop Wiki
channel.description: Last 10 notes on The Loop Wiki

item.title: 01 - Foundations of DJing
item.description: Welcome to the very first month of The Loop Academy.

item.title: Part 8 - Feedback
item.description: We’d love to hear your thoughts as you work through the lessons! Feel free to share your reflections, questions, or insights in our cohort channel.

item.title: Part 7 - Homework
item.description: Put the ideas from Month 1 into practice with your first assignment. Next: Feedback.

item.title: Part 1 - Introduction
item.description: Meet the founders of The Loop and get a quick overview of what to expect from the Academy. Next: What is a DJ?.

item.title: Part 6 - The 5 Layers of DJ Development
item.description: Get an overview of the framework we’ll use throughout the Academy to develop as complete DJs. Next: Homework.

item.title: Part 3 - The Purpose of Music
item.description: Explore how music shapes emotion, connection, memory, and movement on the dancefloor. Next: What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?.

item.title: Part 5 - What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?
item.description: Understand the balance between trust, familiarity, exploration, and connection that creates unforgettable dancefloors.

item.title: Part 2 - What is a DJ?
item.description: Discover why a DJ’s role goes far beyond playing music, and why creating experiences is at the heart of everything we do. Next: The Purpose of Music.

item.title: Part 4 - Why DJing Matters in Brazilian Zouk
item.description: Learn why Brazilian Zouk offers DJs an unusually large amount of creative freedom and influence. Next: What Makes a Dancefloor Feel Good?.
